annotations.summary: order-service submit endpoint 5xx error rate spiked to 8 percent
annotations.description: POST /api/orders/submit returned 500 Internal Server Error for 8.2 percent of requests in the last 5 minutes. Alert correlates with a new client version 2.4.1 that may send incomplete request bodies. Check logs for root cause — suspected null field in request payload.
